prompt: Create a full-body, centered watercolor fashion illustration of a young woman wearing a pastel floral summer kimono on a plain white background. The figure stands upright facing forward with a gentle, modest pose, hands held together in front while holding a small drawstring basket bag. Her face should be intentionally obscured by a soft square blur with no facial features visible. She has dark brown hair styled in a loose elegant updo with wispy strands, decorated on the right side with a cluster of colorful flowers and dangling ornaments. The outfit consists of exactly 5 visible main pieces: 1 pale white kimono with translucent watercolor morning-glory floral patterns in pink, blue, purple, and green leaves; 1 wide pink obi sash with subtle floral texture; 1 decorative obi-jime cord with two small flower-like ornaments at the center; 1 small pink-and-white floral drawstring kinchaku bag with a woven tan basket base; and 1 pair of pink thong geta sandals with dark wooden soles. The kimono sleeves are wide and softly draped, the hem reaches the ankles, and the feet are visible below. Use delicate pastel colors, soft ink outlines, airy watercolor washes, high-key lighting, clean negative space, and a graceful Japanese festival yukata fashion aesthetic. No text, no background objects, no shadows beyond a very faint grounding effect.
